name: portfolio-monorepo
description: Monorepo con instancias separadas: frontend (Angular) y backend (NestJS)

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:frontend && npm run install:backend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n front,back -c cyan,magenta "npm run frontend" "npm run backend"
scripts.dev:all: npm run db:up && npm run dev
scripts.build:all: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d
